name: zlib-ng
description: MeshLib overlay: mirrors vcpkg 2026.03.18's zlib-ng port (2.3.3) so vs2019 (vcpkg 2024.10.21) builds the same zlib-ng version with the same -DZLIB_COMPAT plumbing as vs2022. Without this overlay, vcpkg 2024.10.21's port forgets to pass -DZLIB_COMPAT=ON through to the cmake build, breaking the empty-zlib-shim → zlib-ng-compat path.
